name: PM-KISAN
benefit: ₹6,000 per year in 3 installments of ₹2,000 each

eligibility.description: All landholding farmer families with cultivable land
eligibility.description_hindi: खेती की ज़मीन वाले सभी किसान परिवार
criteria: Family includes husband, wife, and minor children
exclusions: Professionals like doctors, engineers, lawyers, CAs

steps: Submit Aadhaar, land papers, and bank details
Amount credited directly to bank account
steps_hindi: Ya local Patwari se sampark karein
Aadhaar, zameen ke papers, aur bank details dein
Paisa seedha bank account mein aayega

hindi_summary: PM-KISAN mein har kisan ko saal mein 6000 rupaye milte hain. Ye paisa teen installment mein aata hai — 2000-2000 rupaye. Iske liye Aadhaar card, zameen ke papers, aur bank account chahiye. Apply karne ke liye nearest CSC center jaayein ya pmkisan.gov.in par jayein.
